latest.title: “Getting Started with Amazon Web Services: My Learning and Project Experience”
latest.description: Student at Ratan Tata Maharashtra State Skills University | Event & Operations Lead | Cloud enthusiast exploring Amazon Web Services | Building projects with EC2, S3 & Lambda 🚀

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: FTL, a Zero-trust Execution Layer for Coding Agents
latest.description: FTL is THE zero-trust execution layer for AI coding agents. Run your coding agent inside a sandbox environment with shadow credentials, parallel adversarial testing, and human-in-the-loop approval without ever giving the agent access to your real secrets or filesystem. Security, faster than light.

latest.title: AWS Builder Loft: Writing Clear, Searchable, Outcome-Driven Event Articles!
latest.description:
This is an example article for future event organizers at the AWS Builder Loft! Use this as inspiration when creating your Event article! Focus on making a clear, structured, and outcome-driven article. 
When done well, your article makes it easy for the right audience to quickly understand the value of your event and all the fun logistics behind it. :)

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: CivicGuardian AI — A Digital Safeguarding Advocate for Vulnerable Adults
latest.description: CivicGuardian AI is a multi-agent AI safeguarding platform built on Amazon Bedrock Nova that protects vulnerable adults from missing critical deadlines in housing, benefits, and healthcare correspondence. Top 50 finalist in the AWS 10,000 AIdeas Global Competition.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: SenseSync - The Third Channel
latest.description: For 187 years, digital communication has wired up exactly two of the five human senses. SenseSync opens the third. A real-time haptic communication app built on AWS IoT Core, Lambda, Bedrock, and DynamoDB that lets people send rhythm and presence across any distance. Zero dollars a month. The haptic channel, finally online.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: Predict-Epidem
latest.description: Predict-Epidem is an epidemiological intelligence system designed to monitor and predict outbreaks in Latin America. Through a high-fidelity dashboard, it provides real-time data visualization, risk prediction, and critical alerts that transform crisis management into a precision strategy. By integrating climate data, clinical reports, and social media signals, it identifies contagion patterns, allowing healthcare systems to act before medical units reach their limit.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: AgriNexus AI
latest.description: A closed-loop WhatsApp advisor for 100M+ Indian smallholder farmers — pest diagnosis via photo, voice in 4 dialects, and weather-timed nudges that follow up until the farmer confirms action. 100% serverless on AWS.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: DermAI Hope - Bringing Dermatology to 2.5 Billion People Without a Doctor
latest.description: DermAI Hope puts AI-powered skin screening in your pocket: free, private, offline-capable, in 10+ languages. Photograph the affected area, answer a few quick questions, and receive a diagnosis with confidence score, severity rating, care protocol, and urgent care alerts, in seconds, no account required. Built for the 2.5 billion people living without access to a dermatologist, DermAI Hope runs on any phone, works on 2G, and deletes your photo after 24 hours.

latest.title:
Week 3 Lab Completed: EC2 + IAM + Billing + Security
AWS Cloud Club Unilorin Bootcamp 2026 | Team 19
latest.description: This week's lab was all about getting hands-on with core AWS services — Identity and Access Management (IAM), Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2), Billing, and Security. As part of the AWS Cloud Club Unilorin Bootcamp 2026, our team worked through seven tasks that covered everything from setting up billing alerts to deploying a live web page on Ubuntu. Here's a full breakdown of what we did.

latest.title: 3 Must-Knows as a First-Gen Tech Student - and How to Leverage AWS Builder Center
latest.description: Being a first generation student in STEM certainly isn't easy; and there is a lot of things they don't tell you. Using tools like AWS Builder Center will give you the step you need to go from first-gen to your dream career.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: Perspective
latest.description: Perspective is an AI-powered mental health companion that extracts clinical insight from free-form speech — no mood scales required. Using 4-cluster parallel extraction on Amazon Bedrock, validated against the Subjective Units of Distress Scale (SUDS), Work and Social Adjustment Scale (WSAS), PHQ-9, and GAD-7, it serves undiagnosed users and diagnosed patients alike. Clinician-validated by three practising doctors. Built on AWS serverless with Kiro.

latest.title: FROM LEARNING TO BUILDING: DEPLOYING A SECURE WEB SERVER ON AWS
latest.description: As part of the AWS Cloud Club Unilorin Bootcamp, I applied my knowledge by deploying a live web server. This experience strengthened my understanding of cloud security, access control, and cost management using AWS tools.

latest.title: AWS Cloud Club Bootcamp: EC2, IAM, and Security Implementation
latest.description: This project, completed as part of the AWS Cloud Club Unilorin Bootcamp 2026, focuses on deploying a secure Ubuntu-based web server while implementing robust Identity and Access Management (IAM) and cost-control measures.

latest.title: From ideas to deployment: first AWS project
latest.description: Secure Cloud Deployment and Access Management using AWS (EC2, IAM, and Billing Monitoring)

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: MockNest Serverless
latest.description: MockNest Serverless is an open-source, serverless, AI-assisted API mocking platform for AWS that helps teams test integrations faster when external APIs are unavailable, unstable, or hard to control. It uses a lightweight mock runtime in the customer’s own AWS account and AI-generated mocks from API specifications and natural-language instructions to cut setup time and reduce manual mock maintenance.

latest.title: AIdeas Finalist: MaatriSahayak
latest.description: Every year, thousands of Indian mothers die not because medicine failed them — but because the right information never reached the right person in time. MaatriSahayak fixes that with AI that thinks in Hindi, predicts danger before it peaks, and coordinates a full emergency response in under 60 seconds.

latest.title: Hands-On Implementation of Core AWS Services: A Bootcamp Experience
latest.description: Learning AWS through hands-on tasks and collaborative problem-solving.

latest.title: Creating my first AWS Deployment
latest.description: I deployed a live web server as part of a hands-on cloud project, focusing on strong security and cost awareness. I used IAM to manage access, EC2 to host the server, and AWS billing tools to track and control spending.

latest.title: AWS Cloud Club Unilorin Bootcamp Week 3 Assignment
latest.description: Implementing Secure Compute Environments with AWS EC2 and IAM

trending.title: Construye con Strands Agents en Nerdearla Chile 2026
trending.description: Crea tu primer proyecto con Strands Agents en Nerdearla del 17 y 18 de Abril 2026 en Centro GAM, Santiago, Chile.

trending.title: Cómo crear un agente de IA desde cero. Open source, local y gratis.
trending.description: De un modelo que solo responde a uno que busca, razona y recuerda. Todo con código que puedes leer, forkear y contribuir.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Ivy - The World's First Offline-Capable, Proactive AI Tutoring Agent
trending.description: A proactive AI tutoring agent powered by Amazon Bedrock that monitors student progress, initiates outbound voice calls, and runs on-device inference for offline learning addressing educational inequity for millions of Ethiopian students with intermittent connectivity.

trending.title: Introducing Article View Counts on AWS Builder Center
trending.description: You can now see how many builders are reading your articles, giving you a real metric to understand the reach of your content.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: VERA, A Multi-Agent Triage System for Healthcare in Chile
trending.description: A multi-agent healthcare triage system that screens patients in Chilean Spanish, detects crisis signals, and generates clinical reports. Built by two people on AWS for $17/month, designed to integrate with Chile's public health system via HL7 FHIR.

trending.title: Zero to Deployed ☁️: My AWS Journey
trending.description: Deploying a secure and cost-efficient web server using IAM, EC2, and Nginx on Ubuntu.

trending.title: Creating my first AWS Deployment
trending.description: I deployed a live web server as part of a hands-on cloud project, focusing on strong security and cost awareness. I used IAM to manage access, EC2 to host the server, and AWS billing tools to track and control spending.

trending.title: From Zero to Deployed☁️: Securing AWS with IAM, EC2, and Nginx on Ubuntu
trending.description:
As part of the AWS Cloud Club Unilorin Bootcamp(Week 3), 2026, I recently completed a hands-on project focused on a critical cloud reality: building is easy, but building securely and efficiently requires intention.
My mission was to deploy a live web server while maintaining a strict security posture and total cost visibility. Here’s how I built a secure, cost-aware environment using IAM, EC2, and Billing tools.

trending.title: AIdeas Finalist: Global Impact AI Navigator
trending.description: Global Impact AI Navigator (GIAN) is a multi-agent AI platform built on Amazon Bedrock that transforms a raw idea into a complete strategic package in under 60 seconds — SWOT diagnostic, live-grounded funding discovery, personalized roadmap, and a context-aware advisor. Designed for innovators in emerging markets, it democratizes access to the strategic guidance that usually requires expensive consultants or elite networks.

trending.title: Revolutionizing Email Productivity with AI-Powered Automation through CLI
trending.description: As a developer facing email overload, I built a solution for the Q Developer Challenge #1: email management. What began as a simple CLI tool grew into an AI-powered system that has transformed my workflow.
